feedback.text: Some video game publishers are permanently disabling games and related products they have already sold to connsumers. Furthermore, some publishers are selling video games under terms that may already violate Directive 93/13/EEC and deliberately prevent customers from retaining or repairing their purchase. This issue is already backed by more than 1,4 million Europeans as part of the Stop Destroying Videogames initiative. I would like to see work being done in this direction here as well.
